mapper.select: SELECT FILE_PATH_NM FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND BOARD_CLSF = 'trip' ORDER BY FILE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTACH_FILE ( FILE_NO, FILE_CLSF, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_REG, FILE_REG_HM, BOARD_CLSF, BOARD_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_FILE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{fileClsf}, #{filePathNm}, #{fileNm}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{boardClsf}, #{boardId} )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_NO, FILE_CLSF, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_REG, FILE_REG_HM, BOARD_CLSF, BOARD_ID FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE FILE_NO = #{fileNo}
SELECT FILE_NO, FILE_CLSF, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_REG, FILE_REG_HM, BOARD_CLSF, BOARD_ID FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE BOARD_CLSF = #{boardClsf} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY FILE_NO
